title: Poll Message
help: Synchronously polls a single message from a Solace queue. Returns null on timeout. SETTLEMENT — outside a transaction, the message is acked on receipt; if mediation fails afterwards the message is lost (at-most-once). Inside beginTransaction / commit, settlement is deferred — commit acks the message, rollback redelivers it (at-least-once). Wrap poll in a transaction whenever mediation failure should redeliver instead of lose. Manual ack/nack of polled messages is not supported.

value.name: configRef
value.helpTip: The connection to use for the operation.

value.name: queueName
value.helpTip: Name of the queue to poll.

value.name: pollTimeout
value.helpTip: Maximum time to wait for a message in milliseconds. Default: 5000.

value.name: selector
value.helpTip: Optional JMS-style selector expression for filtering (e.g., region = 'EU' AND priority > 5). Leave blank to match any message.

value.name: responseVariable
value.helpTip: Property name where the result JSON is stored. Contains: destination, received, timedOut, messageId, correlationId, payload, contentType.

value.name: overwriteBody
value.helpTip: Replace the message body in Message Context with the polled message's payload.
